# Psi Research Library

A curated library of parapsychology and psi research papers.

## Scope
- 354 papers
- 728 authors
- 118 journals
- Domains: telepathy, remote viewing, psychokinesis, precognition, and related phenomena

## Available Endpoints
- `/api/catalog.json` - Full paper catalog with metadata (title, authors, journal, year, abstract, tags, PDF links)

## Key Sections
- Catalog - Browse and search all papers
- Controversies - Notable debates and disputed findings
- Reading Paths - Curated sequences for learning
- Timeline - Historical development of psi research
- Replications - Studies attempting to replicate key findings
- Stats - Aggregate statistics and visualizations

## Epistemic Neutrality
This site aims for epistemic neutrality, including both supportive and critical/skeptical research. Papers are presented with their original claims and methodology, allowing readers to evaluate evidence independently.
